props.ChoiceText: War made urgent demands on your hands, and the work left little room for pride, rest, or the careful pace good craft prefers.
props.ChoiceBio: A flood of military orders tied your craftsmanship to the violence of war and wore your body down along with your patience.

0.TransitionText: Because a flood of military orders tied your craftsmanship to the violence of war, your life stayed with tools, labor, and the discipline of making things well.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Craftsman, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a flood of military orders tied your craftsmanship to the violence of war, your work was claimed by war until you followed it into soldiering.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Infantry, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a flood of military orders tied your craftsmanship to the violence of war, war and necessity dragged you away from the bench and into paid violence.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TargetText: Campaign deadlines left your hands raw, your back tight, and your body carrying the memory of hurried production.
